# americancloud_dns_zone (Resource)

A hosted DNS zone (domain). Add records with `americancloud_dns_record`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "americancloud_dns_zone" "example" {
  name = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Domain name for the zone, e.g. `example.com`. Changing this forces a new zone.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) When the zone was created (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Zone identifier (UUID).
